description: Next steps mapping for using preservation time results to drive preservation sessions, freezer loading, and storehouse updates.

nextSteps.label: Schedule preservation session
nextSteps.description: Create a preservation SessionRunner session using the calculated times and methods.

steps.title: Prepare jars, trays, or curing space
steps.desc: Gather jars, lids, dehydrator trays, racks, or curing hooks based on the selected preservation method.

metadata.cueNotes: Planning and setup step only; no temperature yet.

steps.title: Run active preservation cycle
steps.desc: Follow the calculated preservation time for canning, dehydrating, or curing. SSA timers and alerts will keep you on track.

metadata.cueNotes: Actual runtime will be taken from preservation calculator outputs and adjusted for altitude if available.

nextSteps.label: Send preserved foods to freezer
nextSteps.description: Create freezer inventory entries for items preserved via freezing or post-blanching steps.

steps.title: Label and pack freezer items
steps.desc: Label packages with food name, date, and method, then place them into their assigned freezer zones.

metadata.cueNotes: Use this step to confirm labels and zones before storage.

nextSteps.label: Update shelf storehouse inventory
nextSteps.description: Create or update shelf-stable storehouse entries for canned, dehydrated, or cured foods.

steps.title: Confirm jars, bags, and cured weights
steps.desc: Count jars, bags, or cured bundles and assign them to storehouse locations and categories.

metadata.cueNotes: Use this step to double-check that all preserved items are logged before storage.

nextSteps.label: Align with batch cooking session
nextSteps.description: Connect preservation results back to batch cooking plans so you can preserve leftovers or planned batches.

steps.title: Choose which batches to preserve
steps.desc: Select which cooked batches will be canned, frozen, or dehydrated based on the preservation times calculated.

metadata.cueNotes: Use this step to map cooked volumes to preservation methods and containers.

nextSteps.label: Schedule preservation for later
nextSteps.description: Use the calculated times to schedule a preservation session into the household calendar instead of running it immediately.

steps.title: Pick a preservation window
steps.desc: Choose a time block that fits the required preservation duration and your household’s quiet hours, Sabbath, and equipment availability.

metadata.cueNotes: Scheduling-only step; actual timers will run when the session starts.
